response.step_by_step_log: I identified the song 'TROUBLE "WAN'DER!' from the on-screen text during the opening of the performance. The song is primarily in English. I used the search query "TROUBLE "WAN'DER!" Ryota Saito Japanese and English lyrics" and found the lyrics on multiple sources including Genius. I then segmented the video based on the performance end and the start of the talk show/merchandise segment.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of the song "TROUBLE "WAN'DER!" by the VTuber Inugami Korone, followed by a dialogue segment showcasing merchandise to celebrate her 6th anniversary.

scenes.description: 3D animated performance by Inugami Korone of the song 'TROUBLE "WAN'DER!".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: Hey, you know what? The rumor that you heard is true "She's back in town" Trouble "Wan"der! Whenever, wherever We're in trouble She will come running, Run Run! Trouble "Wan"der! Up & Up & Down & Down & Left & Right & Left & Right &... Um... let me see, what's next thing to do... Up & Up & Down & Down & Left & Right & Left & Right &... Doggy's back in town! Sniff sniff... oh, find it! Dig here, bow wow wow Mmm... there's nothing here! Trouble "Wan"der! Always doing her best So she's lovable somehow It's just the way she is Trouble "Wan"der! Yeah it may be sometimes she's depressed But never never shows that side Cuz she's a really really wonderful wonderer No no! She's a really Trouble "Wan"der! Up & Up & Down & Down & Left & Right & Left & Right &... Let's take a break now, take a break now... Up & Up & Down & Down & Left & Right & Left & Right &... Doggy's back in town! Back in, back in, back in, back in, back in town! Doggy, Doggy's back in town! Trouble "Wan"der! Dokkin Dokkin Bakkun Bakkun Who can stop her? Doggy, Doggy's back in town! Town! Town! Doggy, Doggy's back in town! Town! Town! Bow wow wow! Trouble "Wan"der! Track down a suspect Never get caught, alright?! ...Doggy, do you hear me? (Wake up!) Trouble "Wan"der! Always doing her best So she's lovable somehow It's just the way she is Trouble "Wan"der! Yeah it may be sometimes she's depressed But never never shows that side Cuz she's a really really wonderful wonderer No no! She's a really Trouble "Wan"der! Up & Up & Down & Down & Left & Right & Left & Right &... Paw, Other Paw... Am I doing right? Up & Up & Down & Down & Left & Right & Left & Right &... Doggy's back in town! Back in, back in, back in, back in, back in town! Doggy, Doggy's back in town! Trouble "Wan"der! Dokkin Dokkin Bakkun Bakkun Who can stop her? Doggy, Doggy's back in town! Town! Town! Doggy, Doggy's back in town! Town! Town! Bow wow wow! Trouble "Wan"der!
